decisions.stackAlignment: Align docs to Convex/Clerk/Vercel reality, not the reverse
decisions.betaScope: PRD V1 Beta only; Listen/Watch/mobile/Protopia explicitly deferred
decisions.contentPipeline: 345 Succession Advisors artifacts already ingested in Convex library_sources table; no bulk intake required
decisions.lessonGenerationTiming: Pre-generate at path-assignment (recommended default; confirm with Brad)
decisions.stewardshipPhaseTrigger: Quiz pass unlocks next lesson (recommended default; confirm with Brad)

executionStrategy.description: Each issue worked in a fresh session in the <40% context smart zone. Phases 2-6 parallelizable after Phase 1.
executionStrategy.parallelism: After Phase 1, dispatch independent issues across phases 2-6 concurrently
executionStrategy.phaseEndProtocol: At the end of every remaining phase: (1) code-simplifier sweeps phase work product, (2) tester/validator runs static checks + reads code for AC verification, (3) verification-before-completion runs evidence-of-execution proof on every claim agents made (forbidden to take agent self-reports at face value), (4) only after all three pass cleanly, proceed to next phase. Trigger for the 3rd gate: prior parallel-coordination accidents where agent self-reports were inaccurate.

nonEngineeringBlockers: Brad: write beta scope doc (in/out for April 15)
Brad: decide AI chat in beta or lessons-only
Brad: identify 2-3 beta families with contacts
Brad: prioritize content from 345 artifacts for first cohort
Brad: walk through 9 curriculum margin notes with Tyler, accept/reject each
Brad: confirm stewardship-phase age thresholds (Roadmap Open Q #1)
Brad: confirm lesson cadence trigger (quiz pass vs time vs advisor; Roadmap Open Q #4)

slices.name: Phase 0 — Audit & Doc Reconciliation
slices.rationale: Outcome dictates how much of phases 2-6 is verification vs greenfield. Run first.

Validate fonts loaded: Fraunces, Source Serif 4, Geist

issues.title: Surface Brad's decision queue with recommended defaults

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: docs/brad-decisions-2026-04.md lists 8 decisions with owner, downstream blockers, recommended defaults
Recommended defaults documented: AI chat IN beta, margin notes APPLY, pre-generate lessons

issues.title: Verify or build FeatureGate runtime pattern

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: FeatureGate component exists at apps/web/src/components/ui/feature-gate.tsx
Supports states: real | launching_soon | disabled
Demo families bypass to real; non-demo default to launching_soon
Per-family override stored in Convex; flip is one mutation
All 7 modules wrapped: education, family, messages, events, assets, estate, professionals
LaunchingSoon overlay component blurs underlying content

issues.title: Wire Generation Tone (Gen 1/2/3) into AI system prompts and lesson generation

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Helper getGenerationTone(member) returns gen1|gen2|gen3 based on age (60+/35-55/16-30)
Single canonical tone block constant; not duplicated
Chat system prompt assembly injects tone block
Lesson generation pipeline injects tone block
Test: same lesson topic for Gen 1 vs Gen 3 produces noticeably different copy

issues.title: Cross-family isolation test in CI

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Test seeds two families with disjoint members
User from Family A authenticated; assertions for Forbidden on every Family B query/mutation
Runs in CI on every PR; failures block merge

issues.title: Vercel AI SDK adoption decision spike

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All OpenAI direct-call sites in convex/ identified and counted
Migration lift estimated
ADR-10 written: adopt-now (with scope) or defer-to-V2 (with trigger)

issues.title: Font swap (DM Serif/Inter → Fraunces/Source Serif 4/Geist) + V1 architecture UX section supersession
issues.source: Audit Issue 0.1 — top-5 finding #1 (font mismatch); §6.6 doc note (UX section stale)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx loads Fraunces (display), Source Serif 4 (body serif), Geist (sans) — replacing DM Serif Display + Inter
Material Symbols icon font preserved
Tailwind/CSS tokens in styles.css updated to reference new font families (font-display, font-serif, font-sans)
Visual smoke check: dev server renders home page with new fonts (no FOUT/FOIT regressions)

Dropbox/Provost/Product/2026-04-07-provost-v1-architecture.md UX Architecture section gets a SUPERSEDED 2026-04-30 note: chat panel is docked-collapsible (not floating with 40/40/40/50 padding); design language is white + Fraunces/Source Serif 4/Geist (not cream / warm tones). Cite Design MOC.md as the canonical reference.

issues.title: Conversational New Member Form (chat tool) — Family + Professionals

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Chat tool add_family_member defined in convex/agent/tools/
Tool prompts conversationally for 8+ fields: name, preferred name, DOB, relationship, role, education level, stewardship phase, email
Tool call requires user approval via existing tool_call_approvals flow
On approval: creates member, sets stewardship phase via Issue 1.2 helper, sends Clerk invite
Variant tool add_professional with professional field set
Empty-state Add Member buttons on Family page + Family Tree + Our Team open chat with tool primed

issues.title: Stewardship phase auto-assign + advisor override UI
issues.blockedBy: Brad confirmation on age thresholds (Roadmap Open Q #1)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: assignStewardshipPhase({ age, role }) function returns emerging|developing|operating|enduring
Default rules: <22+non-trustee=emerging, 22-34=developing, 35-59+active=operating, 60+|trustee|grantor=enduring
Auto-assign on member creation via Issue 2.1 tool
Advisor UI: dropdown on member detail page to override; logged in audit_events

issues.title: 4-format progress circle icons on lesson preview (PRO-131)

Read progress = scroll depth or explicit completion event
Quiz progress = 0/0.5/1.0 for not-started/in-progress/passed
Used on lesson preview AND in family-progress views

issues.title: End-of-article controls (thumbs / Feedback / Share / You might also enjoy)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Thumbs up/down writes to lesson_feedback with kind=thumb
Feedback button opens chat with prompt primed for written feedback

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Line chart per family member showing program progress over time

Recharts or similar; matches Figma styling

issues.title: Lesson 2-at-a-time delivery cadence

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Query myActiveLessons(memberId) returns exactly 2 currently-active lessons

notes: Stack reality (NOT what docs prescribe): Convex + Clerk + Vercel + Next.js App Router + OpenAI direct
345 Succession Advisors artifacts ALREADY ingested in Convex library_sources — no bulk intake required
Phases 2-6 parallelizable after Phase 1 lands; two engineers compress 6-week sequential plan to 3.5 calendar weeks
Recommended defaults if Brad doesn't respond: AI chat IN beta, margin notes APPLY, pre-generate lessons
Run Phase 0 audit first — outcome dictates how much of Phases 2-6 is verification vs greenfield
Critical-path issues: 0.1 audit, 2.1 New Member chat tool, 5.1-5.3 Estate (highest demo impact)
